sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63673" key="li/xneuma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λίχν-ευμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n63673.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a dainty, delicacy</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0524.tlg001:24" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sophr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">24</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
